sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 118:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 118:1
items.html: The light of Malchut clothed in the vessel of Yesod. This is because after the Hod was refined from phase one to the phase of Keter, the level that emerges on that screen has only the level of Malchut, and then he gives it to the vessel of Yesod. (Inner Light, Item‎ 46)
